name: Corn Fritters
recipeIngredient: 12 oz corn, drained from the can
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the egg in a large bowl.
2. Stir in the milk and mix with the corn (drained from the can), sweet peppers, and 1 tablespoon of oil until combined.
3. Add the flour, baking powder, salt, and pepper; beat to combine.
4. Drop spoonfuls of the mixture into hot oil (375 degrees) for shallow or deep frying.
5. Fry until golden brown, about 2-3 minutes on each side.
6. Drain on paper towels.
7. Serve hot. If desired, serve with a syrup.
8. Makes about 4 fritters per person.
